resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def shortestPalindrome(self, s: str) -> str:
        n = len(s)
        if n < 2:
            return s
        rev = s[::-1]
        for i in range(n):
            if s.startswith(rev[i:]):
                return rev[:i] + s
        return rev + s
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: MEDIUM
explanation: Reverse the string and find the longest prefix of the original string that matches a suffix of the reversed string; prepend the unmatched prefix of the reversed string to achieve the shortest palindrome.
